items.name: ui
items.doc: UI layer — GUI (Slint) and MCP server surfaces.

items.name: adapter
items.doc: Adapter layer — data exchange hub, state owner, ViewModel.

items.name: core
items.doc: Core layer — business logic, document model, editor commands.

items.name: pal
items.doc: PAL layer — platform abstraction, Skia/skparagraph rendering.

items.name: gateway
items.doc: Gateway layer — IO adapter, file and media loading.

items.name: shared
items.doc: Shared layer — cross-cutting constants, errors, types.
